sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Let me track the movement pattern more carefully:
Start: Green at [49-51, 32-35] (rows 49-51, cols 32-35), shape 3x4
After RIGHT: [48-51, 36-38], shape 4x3 - moved right ~4 cols
After UP: [45-47, 36-39], shape 3x4 - moved up ~3 rows
After LEFT: [44-47, 33-35], shape 4x3 - moved left ~3 cols
The movement seems to be on a grid where each move shifts the player by 3-4 pixels. The shape alternates between 3x4 and 4x3.
Current position: rows 44-47, cols 33-35
Nearest target: bottom-center at rows 36-39, cols 32-35
I need to go UP to reach the bottom-center target. Let me try pressing UP to move toward it. The target is at rows 36-39 and I'm at rows 44-47, so I need to move up about 7-8 rows. If UP moves ~3 rows, I need about 2-3 UP moves.
But wait - let me also consider that maybe SPACE is needed to interact with targets. Let me first try to navigate to a target position and then try SPACE.
Let me try UP twice to get closer to the bottom-center target.
